name: 365 Golf Pleasant Grove
address: 1064 S N County Blvd, Pleasant Grove, UT 84062
about: 365 Golf is an indoor golf facility in Utah with two locations, Pleasant Grove and Riverton. The venue provides 24/7 access to members, featuring advanced TrackMan 4 technology for golf simulation. They offer a variety of membership plans with limited membership numbers to ensure ample playing time. The facility focuses on providing a premium practice and playing environment with support for golf lessons and club fitting.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-standard TrackMan 4 technology used by the PGA Tour
24/7 access with virtual keycard for both locations
Limited membership ensures plenty of available tee times
Option for private events and group bookings

simulator_hardware.notes: Same technology used on the PGA Tour

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the website mentions 'Bring your clubs!' for the free tour and demonstration, indicating members and guests should use their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of bringing outside food or drinks, and no bar or kitchen facilities are listed among the amenities.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue is focused on serious golf practice and lessons, with no mention of youth programs or junior-friendly features.
